name: Moroccan Eggplant Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove vertical strips of skin from the eggplants using a vegetable peeler.
2. Cut into 1-inch thick slices.
3. Salt and leave to drain for 30 minutes.
4. Rinse well and pat dry.
5. Heat oil in a skillet and fry the slices on both sides until golden brown. Drain excess oil.
6. Chop fried slices and mix with garlic cloves and spices.
7. Return to skillet and continue frying until excess liquids have evaporated.
8. Transfer mixture to a salad bowl.
9. Sprinkle dressing ingredients over the top and allow to cool.
10. When ready to serve, toss the salad, correct the seasoning, and garnish.
